classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪框在完整图顶部绿色标注区域内，显示两孔连接器外形及孔位编号'2'、'1'，并标注'壳体 Housing : H66L6-02P'和'端子 Terminal,T66L6-B'。该区域仅提供连接器壳体和端子型号及外形位置，没有针脚功能、线色或接线关系，因此最接近机械结构/尺寸类信息。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 裁切区是反馈线缆针脚对照表，包含 'PIN'、'FUNCTION'、'COLOR'、'WIERGAGE' 等列，并明确给出 1 到 6 号针脚与 'DC +5V'、'GND'、'VB+'、'VB-'、'SD+'、'SD-' 及对应线色和 '28AWG' 线径；整图右上角蓝框也标注为 'Connector Detail (Feedback Wire)'，符合反馈连接器针脚定义。

动力线 Power Wire

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框在完整标注图左上区域，对应'动力线 Power Wire'表格；可见PIN 1到4分别对应'U相 MOTOR U'、'V相 MOTOR V'、'W相 MOTOR W'和'接地 MOTOR PE'，并给出线色及'20AWG'线径，属于动力线U/V/W/PE针脚接线定义。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR recognized as '人', corrected to connector cavity/pin number '3' based on visible digit shape and connector numbering context.

terminology_notes: Numeric labels inside the connector face are treated as connector cavity or pin identifiers, not dimensions.

dimension_records.reason: The text is a standalone numeric label inside the connector face, indicating a connector cavity or pin position rather than a dimensional value.

unresolved_items.reason: Coordinates and source_ids cannot be invented.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪框显示'SC-06'反馈连接器端面针位图，针位编号为'1'至'6'；完整标注源图中该区域旁的表格标题为'Connector Detail Feedback Wire'，并给出1到6号针脚对应'DC +5V'、'GND'、'VB+'、'VB-'、'SD+'、'SD-'等反馈信号定义，因此属于反馈连接器针脚定义。

OCR merged the lower pin-number row; corrected spacing to match the visible three labels.

terminology_notes: Connector pin numbering is treated as engineering annotation rather than a numeric dimension.
translation_notes: Grouped row labels were normalized with spaced digits to preserve the visible pin order.

dimension_records.reason: Upper row of connector pin labels in the detail view; OCR box covers the row and the visible text is three separate pin numbers.
Lower row of connector pin labels in the detail view; OCR box covers the row and the visible text is three separate pin numbers.

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector detail shows two rows of pin numbering: upper row 6/4/2 and lower row 5/3/1.

classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域为电机外形与轴端局部尺寸图，包含A-A剖视、中心线、尺寸箭头以及'M3螺纹深8'、'孔深8'、'20.5±0.2'、'23.8±0.8'、'116.2±1'等机械加工和外形安装尺寸标注，不是曲线或连接器针脚定义。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR merged nominal value and tolerance; corrected to key width dimension with upper deviation 0 and lower deviation -0.014.
Inserted spaces from OCR text M3Thread.Depth8.
Inserted spaces from OCR text HoleDepth8.
Corrected OCR text 8_0.013 to diameter callout with upper deviation 0 and lower deviation -0.013.
Corrected OCR text 30_0.021 to diameter callout with upper deviation 0 and lower deviation -0.021.

terminology_notes: Diameter symbol Φ restored where OCR omitted it.
Upper and lower deviation notation normalized as +0/-value.
translation_notes: Thread Depth translated as 螺纹深度.
Hole Depth translated as 孔深.

dimension_records.reason: A-A is a visible section view identifier rather than a physical dimension.
The callout is placed under the section label and indicates drawing scale.
The callout is in the A-A section view across the rectangular slot, indicating keyway width tolerance.
The vertical dimension in section A-A defines the keyway/shaft section height relationship.
The horizontal dimension above the shaft end marks the protruding shaft length.
The visible letter A with leader is retained as a datum/reference marker.
Leader points to the shaft end hole and specifies the thread and thread depth.
Leader callout separately specifies drilled hole depth.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 直径8 mm，上偏差0，下偏差-0.013
dimension_records.reason: Vertical diameter callout is on the shaft end; OCR required correction from compact text and lower deviation sign.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 直径30 mm，上偏差0，下偏差-0.021
dimension_records.reason: Vertical diameter dimension at the left of the shaft/body interface defines the locating diameter.
Horizontal dimension under the shaft area defines the distance from the shaft reference line to the shoulder/end feature.
Small horizontal dimension near the shoulder marks a local step width.
Small horizontal dimension near the shaft shoulder identifies a local relief/spacing feature.
Bottom horizontal dimension spans the shaft end region and gives the total protruding length tolerance.
Long bottom dimension spans the main body envelope length.

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 直径8 mm，上偏差0，下偏差-0.013
直径30 mm，上偏差0，下偏差-0.021

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: No mounting hole pattern in this crop; visible data mainly covers shaft end and body envelope.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft interface includes Φ8 +0/-0.013 shaft end, Φ30 +0/-0.021 locating diameter, 12 mm shaft length, M3 thread depth 8, hole depth 8, and A-A keyway section with 3 +0/-0.014 and 9.2 dimensions.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Main visible body length is 116.2±1 mm; shaft protrusion dimensions include 20.5±0.2 mm, 23.8±0.8 mm, 2.8 mm, and 5 mm local features.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector/cable shapes are visible but no usable OCR text labels in this crop identify connector specifications.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No additional visible text without OCR source was added. Low-confidence OCR fragment ocr_015 and duplicate overlapping fragments ocr_010 and ocr_011 were not used.

unresolved_items.reason: Low-confidence isolated stroke likely caused by a dimension or structure line; not a meaningful engineering callout.
Overlapping fragment readings within the Φ8 tolerance area; superseded by combined OCR source ocr_012 and not used separately.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内为电机技术参数表，含可见字段'额定转矩 Rated Torque TN (N.m)'、'最大转矩 Maximum torque Tm (N.m)'、'额定转速 Rated Speed nN (rpm)'及对应数值，工程含义属于电机转矩、转速和功率等性能参数；在给定类别中最接近转矩-转速性能类。

Continuous translated as 连续运行.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于整图标题栏附近，内容为'FINAL TOLERANCE REFERENCE'、'GB/T 1804-m Unit:mm'及线性尺寸范围对应的公差值，如'≤6 ±0.1'、'>6~30 ±0.2'，属于机械图纸尺寸公差参考信息。
